title: Historical Packet 026 And Packet 027 Authority Publication And Host Mirror Resync Gate

Current `/home/olares/code/apex` branch, commit, cleanliness, and missing/present Packet 026 and Packet 027 closure authority evidence

Stop if additional host drift exists or if resync would require force, reset, clean, remote rewrite, runtime mutation, service mutation, install work, or old-clone mutation.
sql_permission_note: This packet authorizes only bounded authority publication and host-mirror resync.
